placeholders.[TAPE]: Tape direction and speed (e.g. Green / Fast)

messages.template: Pre-market analysis for [T]. Current price [P], pre-market price [PREMP], pre-market volume [PREMV]. Volume vs avg [VOL]. Strategy: [STRAT]. Analyze catalyst, key levels, VWAP, risk of trap, and give a Go / No-Go verdict with specific entry trigger.

Give me a Go or No-Go verdict on [T] at [P]. Vol [VOL], RSI [RSI], MACD [MACD], VWAP [VWAP], Spread [SPREAD], Tape [TAPE]. Strategy: [STRAT]. If Go, give exact entry trigger, stop, and first target. If No-Go, tell me what would change it to a Go.

Identify the safest entry trigger for [T] at [P]. RSI [RSI], MACD [MACD], VWAP [VWAP], Vol [VOL], Tape [TAPE]. Is this a breakout, momentum continuation, or VWAP reclaim setup? Where exactly should I enter, what confirms it, and where is the stop?

Scalp entry check on [T]. Price [P], Spread [SPREAD], Tape [TAPE], Vol [VOL], Bid [BID] Ask [ASK]. Is the spread tight enough? Is tape speed sufficient? Where is the bid wall? Give a fast yes/no with entry price and exit target in cents.

Is [T] a real move or a trap? Price [P], Vol [VOL], RSI [RSI], Tape [TAPE], Spread [SPREAD], pre-market [PREMP]. Check for: low float pump, fake volume, wide spread danger, overhead resistance, dilution risk. Verdict: Real move or avoid?
Is the [STRAT] thesis still intact for [T]? Entry [E], current [P], P&L [PNL], time in trade [TIME]. RSI [RSI], MACD [MACD], VWAP [VWAP], Vol [VOL], Tape [TAPE]. Hold, partial exit, or full exit?

Refresh entry and exit points for [T] at [TIME_ET]. Current price [P], entry [E], stop [S], targets [TG1] / [TG2]. RSI [RSI], MACD [MACD], VWAP [VWAP], Vol [VOL], Tape [TAPE]. Strategy: [STRAT]. Update stop, adjust targets if needed.

Recommend a new stop loss for [T]. Entry [E], current price [P], current stop [S], P&L [PNL], time in trade [TIME]. VWAP [VWAP], RSI [RSI], key support visible on tape. Where should stop move to lock in gains without getting shaken out?

Should I scale out 50% of [T] now? Entry [E], current [P], Target 1 [TG1], P&L [PNL], time in trade [TIME]. RSI [RSI], MACD [MACD], Vol [VOL], Tape [TAPE]. Is momentum fading or still strong? Scale now or hold for target?

Volume spike on [T] at [TIME_ET]. Price [P], entry [E], Vol [VOL], RSI [RSI], MACD [MACD], Tape [TAPE]. Is this accumulation or distribution? Does this change the exit plan? Add, hold, or prepare to exit?

Tape turning red on [T] at [TIME_ET]. Price [P], entry [E], stop [S], P&L [PNL]. RSI [RSI], Vol [VOL], Tape [TAPE], Spread [SPREAD]. Bids pulling or holding? Is this a shakeout or real reversal? Stay or exit?

messages.description: Price at resistance — hold or exit?
messages.template: Price [T] hitting resistance at [P]. Entry [E], Target 1 [TG1], time in trade [TIME]. RSI [RSI], MACD [MACD], Vol [VOL], Tape [TAPE]. Is volume strong enough to break through? Scale out here or hold for breakout?
[T] reclaiming VWAP at [VWAP]. Price [P], entry [E], RSI [RSI], Vol [VOL], Tape [TAPE]. Is this a confirmed reclaim or a fake? Entry opportunity for add, or is this just noise?
Scalp time check on [T]. In trade [TIME], entry [E], current [P], P&L [PNL]. Spread [SPREAD], Tape [TAPE]. Scalp window: still valid or overstayed? Exit now or 30 more seconds?

URGENT: [T] at [P]. Entry [E], stop [S], P&L [PNL], time in [TIME]. RSI [RSI], Tape [TAPE], Spread [SPREAD]. Bids pulling. Exit at market NOW or is this a shakeout? Give immediate yes/no then explain.

Build an exit plan for [T]. Entry [E], current [P], P&L [PNL], stop [S], targets [TG1] / [TG2], time in trade [TIME]. RSI [RSI], MACD [MACD], Vol [VOL], Tape [TAPE]. Give me: scale out levels, stop adjustment, and full exit trigger.

Trade going against me on [T]. Entry [E], now at [P], stop [S], P&L [PNL], time in [TIME]. RSI [RSI], Tape [TAPE], Vol [VOL]. Stop not hit yet. Cut now at market, wait for stop, or is there a recovery setup forming?

Trade recap for [T]. Entry [E], exit [P], P&L [PNL], time in trade [TIME], strategy [STRAT]. What worked? What were the warning signs I should have caught earlier? What would have improved the outcome? Key lesson for next trade.

alerts.label: RSI overbought
alerts.template: ⚠️ RSI overbought on [T]. RSI [RSI] at [TIME_ET]. Price [P] vs VWAP [VWAP]. Entry [E], P&L [PNL]. Momentum fading — is thesis still intact?

alerts.label: RSI oversold
alerts.template: RSI oversold on [T]. RSI [RSI] at [TIME_ET]. Price [P], VWAP [VWAP], Vol [VOL], Tape [TAPE]. Reversal setup forming or more downside?

alerts.label: Volume spike 2x+
alerts.template: Volume spike on [T] — [VOL] at [TIME_ET]. Price [P], entry [E], RSI [RSI], Tape [TAPE]. Accumulation or distribution? Does this change the trade?

alerts.label: Volume spike 3x+ — major
alerts.template: MAJOR volume spike on [T] — [VOL] at [TIME_ET]. Price [P], entry [E], RSI [RSI], Tape [TAPE], Spread [SPREAD]. Big move coming — accumulation, distribution, or halt risk?

alerts.label: STOP HIT
alerts.template: 🔴 STOP HIT on [T]. Price [P] reached stop [S]. Entry [E], P&L [PNL], time in [TIME]. Tape [TAPE]. Exit at market or has it bounced? Immediate read needed.

alerts.label: Spread too wide — scalp danger
alerts.template: 🔴 Spread too wide for scalp on [T]. Spread [SPREAD] at [TIME_ET]. Do not enter. Wait for spread to tighten or abort scalp setup.

alerts.label: Spread widening — scalp caution
alerts.template: ⚠️ Spread widening on [T]. Spread [SPREAD] at [TIME_ET]. Price [P], entry [E], P&L [PNL]. If in trade, prepare to exit before spread widens further.

alerts.label: Tape flipping red fast
alerts.template: ⚠️ Tape flipping red fast on [T] at [TIME_ET]. Price [P], entry [E], stop [S], P&L [PNL]. RSI [RSI], Vol [VOL]. Sellers stepping in — shakeout or real reversal?

alerts.label: Target 1 reached
alerts.template: Target 1 hit on [T]. Price [P] reached [TG1]. Entry [E], P&L [PNL], time in [TIME]. RSI [RSI], Vol [VOL], Tape [TAPE]. Scale out 50% now or hold for Target 2 [TG2]?

alerts.label: Target 2 reached
alerts.template: Target 2 hit on [T]. Price [P] reached [TG2]. Entry [E], P&L [PNL], time in [TIME]. RSI [RSI], Tape [TAPE]. Full exit or is there more? Trail stop or take profits?

alerts.label: MACD bearish cross
alerts.template: ⚠️ MACD bearish cross on [T] at [TIME_ET]. MACD [MACD], Price [P], entry [E], RSI [RSI], Vol [VOL]. Momentum shift confirmed? Scale out or hold?

alerts.label: MACD bullish cross
alerts.template: MACD bullish cross on [T] at [TIME_ET]. MACD [MACD], Price [P], RSI [RSI], VWAP [VWAP], Vol [VOL], Tape [TAPE]. Entry opportunity or too late to chase?

alerts.label: VWAP reclaim
alerts.template: [T] reclaiming VWAP [VWAP] at [TIME_ET]. Price [P], RSI [RSI], Vol [VOL], Tape [TAPE]. Confirmed reclaim or fake? Entry on reclaim or wait for retest?

alerts.label: VWAP lost
alerts.template: ⚠️ [T] lost VWAP [VWAP] at [TIME_ET]. Price [P], entry [E], stop [S], P&L [PNL], RSI [RSI], Tape [TAPE]. Thesis weakening — tighten stop or exit?

alerts.label: Scalp — 2 min elapsed
alerts.template: ⚠️ Scalp time alert on [T]. In trade [TIME] — 2 minute window reached. Price [P], entry [E], P&L [PNL], Spread [SPREAD], Tape [TAPE]. Exit now or is there a clear reason to hold?

alerts.label: Approaching intraday high
alerts.template: [T] approaching intraday high [HIGH] at [TIME_ET]. Price [P], entry [E], RSI [RSI], Vol [VOL], Tape [TAPE]. Blue sky breakout potential or resistance rejection? Scale here or hold?
